message:
refactor(agent): introduce AgentEventHandler type alias and owned tool execution

- Replace `&Arc<dyn Fn(AgentEvent) + Send + Sync>` with `AgentEventHandler`
  type alias throughout the agent loop for readability
- Change execute_tool() to take owned ToolCall instead of reference,
  add execute_tool_owned() wrapper for the new signature
- Update stream_assistant_response() and execute_tool_calls() to accept
  AgentEventHandler by value with Arc::clone() pattern at call sites
- Ensures proper ownership semantics when passing event handlers across
  async boundaries without unnecessary double-indirection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
